html:
Exclusive to:  

The Flower Salad is a Vegetable Food item introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC. It is cooked in the Crock Pot by combining 1 Cactus Flower and 2.0 units of Vegetables, with Cactus Flowers contributing to Flower Salad's Vegetable condition. It takes 10 seconds to cook.

Adding 1 Mandrake may result in Mandrake Soup.

Flower Salad excludes any Fruits, Meats, Eggs, Sweeteners or Twigs, leaving only more Vegetables, Ice, Butterfly Wings or Birchnuts as filler.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Requires:
  • Excludes: 
  • Excludes:
  • Excludes:
  • Excludes:

Recipe

×1.5

Examples

×2

×2

×2

×3

50% chance to result in Mandrake Soup

Tips

  • Flower Salad can be made from Cactus Flowers, Cactus Flesh, and Ice. All three ingredients are renewable in Desert biomes.
  • In Don't Starve Together Flower Salad makes for an effective healing item rather than filling hunger or sanity, and is beneficial for those who need it when fighting the Antlion boss, as the Antlion spawns only during Summer, which is also the season in which Cactus Flowers grow.
  • Flower salad can be given to the Crabby Hermit for 1 additional friendship point

Trivia

  • Wolfgang's examination quote for Flower Salad ("Is not spinach, but maybe still work!") may be a reference to Popeye the Sailor Man, who is known for his consumption of spinach that gives him great strength.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

“A bowl of foliage.”
–Wilson
“I'd rather eat a bowl of flames.”
–Willow
“Is not spinach, but maybe still work!”
–Wolfgang
“Ugh, more flowers.”
–Wendy
“SALAD ASSEMBLY: COMPLETED”
–WX-78

–Woodie

“Leaves are för animals. Animals are för eating.”
–Wigfrid

–Webber

“I guess a bunch of petals count as food.”
–Winona
“I don't really like eating.”
–Wortox
“Look bad, but taste okay.”
–Wurt
“Even scavenged leaves can be food in the wilderness!”
–Walter
“What a lovely bowl of yard clippings.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Salad Hoa là một Thực Phẩm Rau Củ được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó được nấu trong Nồi Hầm bằng cách kết hợp 1 Hoa Xương Rồng và 2,0 đơn vị Rau, trong đó Hoa Xương Rồng góp phần vào trạng thái Rau củ của Salad Hoa. Phải mất 10 giây để nấu ăn.

Flower Salad excludes any [[Fruit]]s, [[Meats]], [[Eggs]], Sweeteners or [[Twigs]], leaving only more Vegetables, [[Ice]], [[Butterfly Wings]] or [[Birchnut]]s as filler. __NOTOC__ == Prerequisites == * Requires: [[File:Cactus Flower.png|link=Cactus Flower]] * Requires: [[File:Vegetables Crock Pot.png|link=Vegetables]] * Excludes: [[File:Fruits Crock Pot.png|link=Fruit]] * Excludes: [[File:Meats Crock Pot.png|link=Meats]] * Excludes: [[File:Eggs Crock Pot.png|link=Eggs]] * Excludes: [[File:Twigs.png|link= Twigs]][[File:Sweetener.png|link=Sweetener]] == [[File:Cookbook.png|32px]] Recipe == {{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |item2 = Vegetables |item3 = Filler |count3 = 1 |tool = Crock Pot |result = Flower Salad |count2 = 1.5 }} == Examples == {{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |count1 = 2 |item2 = Cacti Flesh |count2 = 2 |tool = Crock Pot |result = Flower Salad }}{{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |item2 = Cactus Flower |item3 = Cactus Flower |item4 = Cactus Flower |result = Flower Salad |tool = Crock Pot }} {{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |item2 = Cactus Flesh |count2 = 2 |item3 = Ice |tool = Crock Pot |result = Flower Salad }} {{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |item2 = Mushrooms |item3 = Mushrooms |item4 = Mushrooms |tool = Crock Pot |result = Flower Salad }} {{Recipe |item1 = Cactus Flower |count1 = 3 |item2 = Mandrake |tool = Crock Pot |result = Flower Salad |note = 50% chance to result in [[Mandrake Soup]] }} == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Flower Salad can be made from Cactus Flowers, [[Cactus Flesh]], and Ice. All three ingredients are renewable in [[Desert]] biomes. * In ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' Flower Salad makes for an effective [[Health|healing]] item rather than filling hunger or sanity, and is beneficial for those who need it when fighting the [[Antlion]] boss, as the Antlion spawns only during [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]], which is also the season in which Cactus Flowers grow. * Flower salad can be given to the [[Crabby Hermit]] for 1 additional friendship point =={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== *Wolfgang's examination quote for Flower Salad ("Is not spinach, but maybe still work!") may be a reference to [[wikipedia:Popeye|Popeye the Sailor Man]], who is known for his consumption of spinach that gives him great strength. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Flower Salad 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
